lineage.Process: FeatureClassToFeatureClass "P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp" "P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb" Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712 # "Row_Labels "Row_Labels" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Row Labels,-1,-1;Latitude "Latitude" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Latitude,-1,-1;Longitude "Longitude" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Longitude,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_A "Wolfcamp_A" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Wolfcamp A,-1,-1;WolfcampA_ "WolfcampA_" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,WolfcampA_,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_A_1 "Wolfcamp_A_1" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Wolfcamp_A,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_B "Wolfcamp_B" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Wolfcamp_B,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_1 "Wolfcamp_1" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Wolfcamp_1,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_T "Wolfcamp_T" true true false 24 Double 15 23 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\Permian_Wells.shp,Wolfcamp_T,-1,-1" #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass "P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712" K:\Olga_P\Projects\Permian\Production\Shapefiles Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712.shp # "Row_Labels "Row_Labels" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,Row_Labels,-1,-1;Latitude "Latitude" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,Latitude,-1,-1;Longitude "Longitude" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,Longitude,-1,-1;Wolfcamp_A "Wolfcamp_A" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,Wolfcamp_A,-1,-1;WC_A_Elev "WC_A_Elev" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,WC_A_Elev,-1,-1;WC_A_Shale "WC_A_Shale" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,WC_A_Shale,-1,-1;WC_Base "WC_Base" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,WC_Base,-1,-1;WC_Base_El "WC_Base_El" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,WC_Base_Elev,-1,-1;WC_Thick "WC_Thick" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,P:\states 3.0 maps\Layers\SedimentaryBasins\PermianBasin_Structure.gdb\Wells_WolfCamp_with_StratigraphicPicks_201712,WC_Thick,-1,-1" #

dataIdInfo.idPurp: This feature class/shapefile represents wells in the Wolfcamp formation and includes information on stratigraphic picks. Source: EIA based on DrillingInfo Inc., Bureau of Economic Geology, and U.S. Geological Survey. Created December 2017.

Consts.useLimit: The U.S. Energy Information Administration shall not be held liable for improper or incorrect use of the data described and/or contained herein. These data and related graphics, if available, are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The information contained in these data is dynamic and may change over time. The U.S. Energy Information Administration gives no warranty, expressed or implied, as to the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of these data.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
